text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇻🇪 U.S. President Donald Trump stated that they have done the same in Iran as they have done in Venezuela, adding that Iran's economy is crashing and the power of the blockade is why. "Off the ground, you say, this is not what I bargained for. This is…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 U.S. President Donald Trump stated that he gas settled 8 wars, adding that Venezuelan Opposition leader María Corina Machado gave him the Nobel peace prize because trump deserved it. "As far as peace, I settled eight wars and people try and dispute it, but then they go over them and almost in every case, they sent letters thanking me and letters to the Nobel Committee. I don't care about that. Maria was very nice. She gave me her Nobel Peace Prize, because she said she didn't deserve it. She was very, very nice, but I settled eight wars and in every case, the people, the prime ministers or presidents wrote letters thanking me." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇻🇪 美国总统唐纳德·特朗普表示，他们在伊朗所做的事情与在委内瑞拉所做的一样，并补充说伊朗经济正在崩溃，这就是封锁的力量所在。‘离开地面，你说，这不是我想要的。这是……’” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 美国总统唐纳德·特朗普表示，他已经解决了8场战争，并补充说委内瑞拉反对派领导人玛丽亚·科里纳·马查多把诺贝尔和平奖给了他，因为特朗普当之无愧。“至于和平，我解决了八场战争，人们试图反驳这一点，但当他们回顾这些案例时，几乎在每一个案例中，他们都发信感谢我，并致信诺贝尔委员会。我不在乎那个。玛丽亚非常好。她把她的诺贝尔和平奖给了我，因为她说她不配得到它。她非常好，非常好，但我解决了八场战争，在每一个案例中，人们，总理或总统都写信感谢我。” @wfwitness

text: Trump on Iran: I am trying to save that country in a certain way.
text_zh: 特朗普谈伊朗：我正在以某种方式试图拯救那个国家。

text: Trump blasts Merz: Germany—he is doing a terrible job. He has got immigration problems, he has got energy problems, he has got problems of all kinds, and he has a big problem with Ukraine.
text_zh: 特朗普抨击默茨：德国——他做得太糟糕了。他有移民问题，有能源问题，有各种各样的麻烦，而且他在乌克兰问题上遇到了大麻烦。

text: Trump: Biden gave 350 billion dollars for Ukraine, which was insane. It’s one of the reasons why the war went on.
text_zh: 特朗普：拜登为乌克兰提供了3500亿美元，这太疯狂了。这是战争持续的原因之一。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇻🇪 U.S. President Donald Trump stated the U.S. is doing great in Venezuela, and that it is producing the most oil it has in decades. "Venezuela and where we're doing great, we're getting along with them great. We're working very closely with them. They're…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇻🇪 U.S. President Donald Trump stated that they have done the same in Iran as they have done in Venezuela, adding that Iran's economy is crashing and the power of the blockade is why. "Off the ground, you say, this is not what I bargained for. This is no good. Anyway, so, and now, you know, Venezuela was amazing, but now we're doing essentially the same thing, but it's larger. We're essentially doing the same thing, and Iran can't let Iran have a nuclear weapon, and their economy is crashing. The blockade is incredible. The power of the blockade is incredible. They're not getting any money from oil, and hopefully it can be worked out very soon." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇻🇪 美国总统唐纳德·特朗普表示，美国在委内瑞拉做得很好，而且委内瑞拉的石油产量达到了几十年来的最高水平。‘委内瑞拉，我们做得很好，我们和他们相处得很好。我们与他们密切合作。他们是……’” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇻🇪 美国总统唐纳德·特朗普表示，他们在伊朗所做的事情与在委内瑞拉所做的一样，并补充说伊朗经济正在崩溃，这就是封锁的力量所在。‘离开地面，你说，这不是我想要的。这不好。总之，现在，你知道，委内瑞拉很棒，但现在我们基本上在做同样的事情，只是规模更大。我们基本上在做同样的事情，伊朗不能拥有核武器，他们的经济正在崩溃。封锁令人难以置信。封锁的力量令人难以置信。他们没有从石油中获得任何资金，希望很快能解决这个问题。’” @wfwitness

text: Open Source Intel A fire aboard the USS Higgins knocked out all power and propulsion, leaving the guided-missile destroyer disabled in the Indo-Pacific. No casualties. Exact location not disclosed. CBS News. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2049930829082636308/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 一场火灾导致希金斯号驱逐舰（USS Higgins）失去所有动力和推进力，使这艘导弹驱逐舰在印太地区瘫痪。无人员伤亡。具体地点未披露。CBS新闻。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2049930829082636308/photo/1 推文

text: OSINTdefender The last 24 hours of playback via http://MarineTraffic.com of the Strait of Hormuz shows some transits are occurring and are mostly using the Iranian traffic separation scheme. Daily traffic transit volume is still less than 10% of pre-war levels, which averaged 130 per day. https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2049930422067327213/video/1 tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 通过 http://MarineTraffic.com 回放的霍尔木兹海峡过去24小时的情况显示，有一些过境正在发生，且大多使用伊朗的交通分离方案。每日交通过境量仍低于战前水平的10%，战前平均每天为130次。https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2049930422067327213/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Trump: "Iran is dying to make a deal. I can only tell you that." https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2049929831509279235/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 特朗普：“伊朗渴望达成协议。我只能告诉你这些。” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2049929831509279235/video/1 推文

text: OSINTdefender President Donald J. Trump has posted to Truth Social stating, "I will be removing the Tariffs and Restrictions on Whiskey having to do with Scotland’s ability to work with the Commonwealth of Kentucky on Whiskey and Bourbon." https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2049927146081022363/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 唐纳德·J·特朗普总统在“真实社交”（Truth Social）上发文称：“我将取消与苏格兰向肯塔基州联邦供应威士忌和波本威士忌能力有关的威士忌关税和限制。” https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2049927146081022363/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Hegseth: We don't need congressional authorization regarding Iran because the two-month deadline stopped with the announcement of the ceasefire https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2049925780398821571/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 海格塞斯（Hegseth）：我们不需要关于伊朗的国会授权，因为两个月的最后期限随着停火协议的宣布而终止 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2049925780398821571/photo/1 推文

text: Disclose.tv JUST IN - U.S. Senate votes unanimously to ban its members and staff from trading on "prediction markets." — Bloomberg tweet
text_zh: Disclose.tv 快讯——美国参议院一致投票禁止其成员和工作人员在“预测市场”进行交易。——彭博社推文

text: Reporter: You talked about possibly moving out some troops from Germany. Would you consider the same thing for Spain and Italy? Trump: Yeah, probably. Why shouldn’t I? Italy has not been of any help to us, and Spain has been horrible—absolutely horrible.
text_zh: 记者：你谈到了可能从德国撤出一些军队。你会考虑对西班牙和意大利采取同样的做法吗？特朗普：是的，可能会。我为什么不呢？意大利对我们没有任何帮助，而西班牙的表现太糟糕了——绝对糟糕。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇻🇪 The first regular commercial service between the United States and Venezuela since 2019 is now en route. American Eagle flight ENY3599, an Embraer E175LR in the America 250 livery operated by Envoy, departed Miami and is bound for Caracas. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇻🇪 The first regular direct flight from the U.S. to Venezuela since 2019 has landed in Caracas after departing from Miami. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇻🇪 自2019年以来美国和委内瑞拉之间的首个定期商业航班现已在途中。由Envoy运营、采用美国250周年涂装的巴西航空工业公司E175LR飞机，美国之鹰航班ENY3599已从迈阿密起飞，前往加拉加斯。@wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇻🇪 自2019年以来从美国飞往委内瑞拉的首个定期直飞航班在从迈阿密起飞后已降落在加拉加斯。@wfwitness

text: Israel killed yet another entire family in Lebanon. 📸 Mahdi Hassan Harb, their young son. Hassan Muhammad Harb, the father. Israa Abdullah Harb, his wife. Abdullah Hassan Harb, their son.
text_zh: 以色列在黎巴嫩又杀害了整整一家人。📸 Mahdi Hassan Harb，他们年幼的儿子。Hassan Muhammad Harb，父亲。Israa Abdullah Harb，妻子。Abdullah Hassan Harb，他们的儿子。

text: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 Bronze Tan Donny: "The country is doing really well, despite military operation. Iran is dying to make a deal" He start looking like a living Oompa Loompa statue... 🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost
text_zh: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 古铜色唐尼：“尽管有军事行动，这个国家还是做得很好。伊朗渴望达成协议。” 他看起来越来越像一尊活生生的奥姆帕·伦帕（Oompa Loompa）雕像…… 🚩 ResistanceTrench | 推广

text: Trump: María gave me her Nobel Peace Prize because she said she didn’t deserve it.
text_zh: 特朗普：玛丽亚把她的诺贝尔和平奖给了我，因为她说她不配得到它。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷 U.S. President Donald Trump stated that Iran is dying to make a deal. "The country is doing really well, and that's despite a military operation. I don't call it a war. Iran is dying to make a deal." @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇻🇪 U.S. President Donald Trump stated the U.S. is doing great in Venezuela, and that it is producing the most oil it has in decades. "Venezuela and where we're doing great, we're getting along with them great. We're working very closely with them. They're doing more oil now than they've done in many, many decades, actually. They're making more money, and so are we. You know, it's like a joint venture, to be honest. And we've paid for the attack many times over. The attack, something you've never heard before, probably. I always used to say to the victor, belong with the spoils. But we've paid for the attack, which is always expensive. But it was a less-than-one-day attack. It was actually a 45-minute attack. And that's a good — you know, they have a good military in Venezuela, but this — they did not expect that and that and that and that, other than that. But when these suckers come at you." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷 美国总统唐纳德·特朗普表示，伊朗渴望达成协议。‘尽管有军事行动，这个国家还是做得很好。我不称之为战争。伊朗渴望达成协议。’” @wfwitness ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇻🇪 美国总统唐纳德·特朗普表示，美国在委内瑞拉做得很好，而且委内瑞拉的石油产量达到了几十年来的最高水平。‘委内瑞拉，我们做得很好，我们和他们相处得很好。我们与他们密切合作。他们现在的石油产量比几十年来都要多。他们赚了更多的钱，我们也一样。你知道，老实说，这就像一个合资企业。我们已经多次支付了攻击的费用。这次攻击，可能是你从未听说过的。我总是对胜利者说，战利品属于你。但我们支付了攻击的费用，这总是很昂贵的。但这只是一次不到一天的攻击。实际上是一次45分钟的攻击。这是一个很好的——你知道，他们在委内瑞拉有一支很好的军队，但这——他们没有预料到这一点，这一点，这一点，除此之外。但当这些笨蛋冲向你时。’” @wfwitness

text: 🔄 Forwarded from АФРИКАРЬ: 📝 Дни идут 📝 И правительство всё держится Вопреки «аналитике» и прогнозам западных СМИ, фактически «похоронивших» малийскую государственность ещё пару дней назад, обстановка в стране уже не так сильно меняется в пользу боевиков. Совместными усилиями ВС Мали и российского Африканского корпуса удаётся сдерживать наступление радикальных исламистов практически на всех основных направлениях, включая Менаку , которую боевикам так и не удалось захватить. Критического ухудшения не произошло и вокруг Бамако — «блокада» города боевиками «Джамаат Нусрат аль-Ислам валь-Муслимин» пока больше похожа на пиар-акцию, нежели на реальные события, сопоставимые хотя бы с осенними масштабами. ❗️ Относительная стабилизация стала возможной во многом благодаря постоянным авиаударам правительственных сил по местам скоплений боевиков и воздушной разведке , обеспечивающей предотвращение засад на ключевых маршрутах. 📍 Карта в высоком разрешении 📍 English version #карта #Мали 💀 @rybar_africa — там, где политика горячее экватора 💸 Поддержать нас
text_zh: 🔄 转发自 АФРИКАРЬ: 📝 时光流逝 📝 政府依然稳固。尽管西方媒体的“分析”和预测在几天前实际上已经“埋葬”了马里的国家地位，但该国的局势并没有像武装分子预期的那样发生剧烈变化。在马里武装部队和俄罗斯非洲军团的共同努力下，激进伊斯兰分子的攻势在几乎所有主要方向上都得到了遏制，包括武装分子始终未能攻下的梅纳卡。巴马科周边的局势也没有出现严重恶化——“伊斯兰支持组织”（JNIM）武装分子对该市的“封锁”目前看起来更像是一场公关活动，而非与秋季规模相当的实际事件。 ❗️ 相对稳定的实现，很大程度上归功于政府军对武装分子聚集地持续不断的空袭，以及确保防止关键路线上伏击的空中侦察。 📍 高清地图 📍 英文版 #地图 #马里 💀 @rybar_africa — 政治比赤道更火热的地方 💸 支持我们

text: ⚡️ 🇨🇴 The Colombian Armed Forces announced that one guerilla fighter was killed and another captured during clashes with FARC dissidents in the Nariño Department as attacks in southwestern Colombia continue. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇨🇴 哥伦比亚武装部队宣布，在纳里尼奥省与哥伦比亚革命武装力量（FARC）异见分子的冲突中，一名游击队员被击毙，另一名被俘，哥伦比亚西南部地区的袭击仍在持续。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 U.S. President Donald Trump stated that Iran is dying to make a deal. "The country is doing really well, and that's despite a military operation. I don't call it a war. Iran is dying to make a deal." @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国总统唐纳德·特朗普表示，伊朗迫切希望达成协议。“这个国家表现得非常好，尽管有军事行动。我不称之为战争。伊朗迫切希望达成协议。” @wfwitness

text: Reporter: FIFA says Iran will play in the World Cup in the U.S. Trump: If Gianni said it, I am okay. Gianni Infantino—that is a piece of work.
text_zh: 记者：国际足联表示伊朗将参加在美国举行的世界杯。特朗普：如果詹尼（Gianni）这么说了，我没意见。詹尼·因凡蒂诺（Gianni Infantino）——那真是个厉害角色。

text: The US deployed 1 x MC-130J and 2 x HC-130J special operations aircraft to Qatar (Al Udeid AB), boosting special ops and rescue capability. MC-130J: special forces insertion/extraction, covert ops. HC-130J: combat search-and-rescue + refueling for rescue helos.
text_zh: 美国向卡塔尔（乌代德空军基地）部署了1架MC-130J和2架HC-130J特种作战飞机，以增强特种作战和救援能力。MC-130J：特种部队渗透/撤离、隐蔽行动。HC-130J：战斗搜救+救援直升机加油。

text: Trump: Venezuela was amazing, and now we are doing essentially the same thing in Iran.
text_zh: 特朗普：委内瑞拉曾经很棒，而现在我们在伊朗基本上在做同样的事情。

text: ICC prosecutor Karim Khan: Senator Graham told me: ‘This court is for Africa and thugs like Putin, not for democracies like Israel and the U.S.’”
text_zh: 国际刑事法院检察官卡里姆·汗：格雷厄姆参议员告诉我：‘这个法院是为非洲和像普京这样的暴徒准备的，而不是为像以色列和美国这样的民主国家准备的。’

text: Trump: We are in what some people would call a "war."
text_zh: 特朗普：我们正处于某些人所说的“战争”之中。

text: Trump on Iran: Their drone factories are about 82% down. Their missile factories are almost 90% down.
text_zh: 特朗普谈伊朗：他们的无人机工厂已经瘫痪了约82%。他们的导弹工厂几乎瘫痪了90%。

text: Trump: Iran is dying to make a deal. I can only tell you that.
text_zh: 特朗普：伊朗迫切希望达成协议。我只能告诉你这些。

text: Iran's Ghalibaf mocks the U.S: If you build two walls across the U.S., total length is 7,755 km. Still about 1,000 km short of Iran’s borders. Good luck blockading that. P.S. For Pete Hegseth: 1 km = 0.62 mi
text_zh: 伊朗议长卡利巴夫嘲讽美国：如果你在美国边境修建两道墙，总长度为7755公里。距离伊朗的边界仍然差了约1000公里。祝你们封锁成功。附：致皮特·海格塞斯（Pete Hegseth）：1公里 = 0.62英里

text: NEW: A major fire aboard Arleigh Burke-class guided-missile destroyer USS Higgins disabled the ship, causing a full loss of power and propulsion. Fire led to complete electrical failure and propulsion loss, leaving the destroyer unable to move. Incident occurred in the Indo-Pacific region, exact location not disclosed. No casualties among crew. Source: CBS News
text_zh: 最新消息：阿利·伯克级导弹驱逐舰“希金斯”号（USS Higgins）发生重大火灾，导致该舰瘫痪，完全失去动力和推进力。火灾导致电力系统彻底失效和推进力丧失，使该驱逐舰无法移动。事故发生在印太地区，具体地点未披露。船员中无伤亡。来源：哥伦比亚广播公司新闻（CBS News）

text: Open Source Intel Trump congratulates Ali al-Zaidi on his nomination as Iraq's next Prime Minister, calling it "the beginning of a tremendous new chapter" between the U.S. and Iraq. "We wish him success as he works to form a new Government free from terrorism that could deliver a brighter future for Iraq." tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 特朗普祝贺阿里·扎伊迪（Ali al-Zaidi）被提名为伊拉克下一任总理，称这是美伊之间“开启一个巨大新篇章的开始”。“我们祝愿他在努力组建一个没有恐怖主义的新政府时取得成功，这将为伊拉克带来更美好的未来。” 推文

text: Open Source Intel Iranian Parliament Speaker, Ghalibaf: If you build two walls, one from NYC to the West Coast and another from LA to the East Coast, the total length will be 7,755 km, which is still about 1,000 km short of Iran’s total borders. Good luck blockading a country with those borders. P.S. For Pete Hegseth: 1 km = 0.62 mi tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 伊朗议会议长卡利巴夫（Ghalibaf）：如果你建两堵墙，一堵从纽约市到西海岸，另一堵从洛杉矶到东海岸，总长度将是7755公里，这仍然比伊朗的总边界短约1000公里。祝你们封锁这样一个边界的国家好运。附：致皮特·赫格塞斯（Pete Hegseth）：1公里=0.62英里 推文

text: Open Source Intel The U.S. Senate unanimously passed a resolution banning its members from trading on prediction markets. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2049919174894329875/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 美国参议院一致通过了一项决议，禁止其成员在预测市场上进行交易。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2049919174894329875/photo/1 推文

text: Status-6 (War & Military News) Israeli soldier intercepts Hezbollah's FPV drone employing SMASH Fire Control System installed on an M4 automatic rifle. SMASH is an AI-powered target acquisition and tracking system designed to enhance the precision of small arms against ground and aerial threats. https://twitter.com/Archer83Able/status/2049918974721183985/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Status-6（战争与军事新闻） 以色列士兵使用安装在M4自动步枪上的SMASH火控系统拦截了真主党的FPV无人机。SMASH是一种人工智能驱动的目标获取和跟踪系统，旨在提高轻武器对地面和空中威胁的精确度。 https://twitter.com/Archer83Able/status/2049918974721183985/video/1 推文

text: ↩️ Reply to ResistanceTrench: "🌟⚡️🇮🇱 Israeli media: As a result of the explosion of a Hezbollah-affiliated drone this morning in Shomera, secondary explosions of ammunition that was present at the targeted site occurred. 🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost" 🇮🇱 ⚡️ 🟡 New aftermath footages from Shomera , northern Israel, where Hezbollah FPV drones hit an IDF artillery site, destroying two artillery pieces and an M548 ammunition transport vehicle. Early Israeli reports referred to a synagogue being attacked, but the building is situated inside the army grounds. 🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 ResistanceTrench：“🌟⚡️🇮🇱 以色列媒体：由于今天早上在肖梅拉（Shomera）发生的一架真主党附属无人机爆炸，目标地点存在的弹药发生了二次爆炸。🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost” 🇮🇱 ⚡️ 🟡 以色列北部肖梅拉的最新现场画面，真主党FPV无人机袭击了以色列国防军的一个炮兵阵地，摧毁了两门火炮和一辆M548弹药运输车。早期的以色列报道称一座犹太教堂遭到袭击，但该建筑位于军队驻地内。🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost

text: 🇪🇸 🇮🇱 ⚡ Pedro Sánchez, Prime Minister of Spain on the Israeli attack on the flotilla to Gaza: Israel is once again violating international law by attacking a civilian flotilla in waters that do not belong to it. Our government is doing everything necessary to protect the Spanish citizens who were detained and to assist them. But that is not enough. The European Union must now suspend its cooperation agreement with Israel and demand that Netanyahu abide by our maritime laws. 🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost

text: Fifa President Gianni Infantino confirmed Iran will compete in the 2026 FIFA World Cup in the US as planned, despite recent conflict and political tensions. Iran are scheduled to play group matches in Los Angeles (vs New Zealand and Belgium) and Seattle (vs Egypt).
text_zh: 国际足联主席詹尼·因凡蒂诺确认，尽管近期存在冲突和政治紧张局势，伊朗将按计划参加在美国举行的2026年国际足联世界杯。伊朗定于在洛杉矶（对阵新西兰和比利时）和西雅图（对阵埃及）进行小组赛。

text: Trump: Anybody running for President or Vice President should be forced to take a Cognitive Examination prior to entering the Race! By doing so, we wouldn’t be surprised at people like Barack “Hussein” Obama, or Sleepy Joe Biden, getting “ELECTED.” Our Country would be a much better place! I took the Exam three times during my (“THREE!”) Terms as President, and ACED IT ALL THREE TIMES — An Achievement that, even on a single Exam, according to the Doctors, has rarely been done before!
text_zh: 特朗普：任何竞选总统或副总统的人都应在参选前被迫接受认知检查！这样一来，我们就不会对巴拉克·“侯赛因”·奥巴马或瞌睡乔·拜登这类人“当选”感到惊讶了。我们的国家会变得更好！我在担任总统的（“三届！”）任期内参加了三次考试，并且三次都拿了满分——据医生说，即使只考一次，这也是极少有人能取得的成就！

text: Trump: Congratulations to Ali al-Zaidi on his Nomination to be the next Prime Minister of Iraq! We wish him success as he works to form a new Government free from terrorism that could deliver a brighter future for Iraq. We look forward to a strong, vibrant, and highly productive new relationship between Iraq and the United States. This is the beginning of a tremendous new chapter between our Nations — Prosperity, Stability, and Success like never seen before. Again, Ali, CONGRATULATIONS!
text_zh: 特朗普：祝贺阿里·扎伊迪（Ali al-Zaidi）被提名为下一任伊拉克总理！我们祝愿他在组建一个远离恐怖主义的新政府方面取得成功，为伊拉克带来更美好的未来。我们期待伊拉克与美国之间建立一种强大、充满活力且高效的新关系。这是我们两国之间开启崭新篇章的开始——前所未有的繁荣、稳定与成功。再次祝贺你，阿里！

text: Trump: In Honor of the King and Queen of the United Kingdom, who have just left the White House, soon headed back to their wonderful Country, I will be removing the Tariffs and Restrictions on Whiskey having to do with Scotland’s ability to work with the Commonwealth of Kentucky on Whiskey and Bourbon, two very important Industries within Scotland and Kentucky. People have wanted to do this for a long time, in that there had been great Inter-Country Trade, especially having to do with the Wooden Barrels used. The King and Queen got me to do something that nobody else was able to do, without hardly even asking!
text_zh: 特朗普：为了向刚刚离开白宫、即将返回他们美好国家的英国国王和王后致敬，我将取消与苏格兰威士忌相关的关税和限制，这些限制涉及苏格兰与肯塔基州在威士忌和波本威士忌方面的合作，这两个行业在苏格兰和肯塔基州都非常重要。人们长期以来一直希望这样做，因为两国之间一直有巨大的贸易往来，特别是涉及所使用的木桶。国王和王后几乎没怎么开口，就让我做到了别人都做不到的事情！

text: 🇷🇺 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 The US General Staff accused Russia of assisting Iran ▪️ Regarding Moscow's assistance to Tehran, the Chairman of the US Joint Chiefs of Staff, General Dan Kaine, spoke at a Senate hearing. ▪️ He refused to go into details, given the public nature of the meeting. ➖ "There are certainly certain actions there," Kaine said. ▪️ Senator Roger Wicker from Mississippi, a Republican and the Chairman of the Senate Armed Services Committee, went even further. ➖ "There is no doubt that Vladimir Putin's Russia is taking serious actions to undermine our efforts to achieve success in Iran," he said. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇷🇺 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国总参谋部指责俄罗斯协助伊朗 ▪️ 关于莫斯科对德黑兰的援助，美国参谋长联席会议主席丹·凯恩将军在参议院听证会上发表了讲话。 ▪️ 鉴于会议的公开性质，他拒绝透露细节。 ➖ “那里肯定存在某些行动，”凯恩说。 ▪️ 来自密西西比州的共和党参议员、参议院军事委员会主席罗杰·威克走得更远。 ➖ “毫无疑问，弗拉基米尔·普京的俄罗斯正在采取严重行动，破坏我们为在伊朗取得成功所做的努力，”他说。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ Execution of Sasan Azadvar, Perpetrator of Attack on Security Forces in Isfahan 🔹 Sasan Azadvar was executed this morning after being convicted of actions against national security, attacking security personnel, and destroying public and private property belonging to the people of Iran. 🔹 He was identified and arrested during the January 2026 unrest, under surveillance by the “Unknown Soldiers of Imam Mahdi (aj)” within Iran’s Ministry of Intelligence. 🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 伊斯法罕袭击安全部队的肇事者萨桑·阿扎德瓦尔被处决 🔹 萨桑·阿扎德瓦尔因犯有危害国家安全、袭击安全人员以及破坏伊朗人民公共和私人财产的罪行，于今天上午被处决。 🔹 他是在2026年1月的骚乱中被伊朗情报部下属的“伊玛目马赫迪（愿主福安之）的无名士兵”监视并逮捕的。 🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇶🇺🇸 Iraqi prime minister‑designate Ali Faleh al‑Zaydi has received phone calls from U.S. President Donald Trump and from US envoy Tom Barak. Both congratulated him on his formal appointment to form Iraq’s new government. Trump extended an official invitation…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇶 U.S. President Donald Trump has congratulated Ali al‑Zaydi on his nomination to be the next prime minister of Iraq. Trump said he wished him success in forming a new government free from terrorism that could deliver a brighter future for Iraq, and looked forward to a strong, productive new relationship between the two nations. “This is the beginning of a tremendous new chapter between our Nations - Prosperity, Stability, and Success like never seen before,” Trump wrote. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇶🇺🇸 伊拉克候任总理阿里·法利赫·扎伊迪接到了美国总统唐纳德·特朗普和美国特使汤姆·巴拉克的电话。两人都祝贺他正式获任命组建伊拉克新政府。特朗普发出了正式邀请……” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇶 美国总统唐纳德·特朗普祝贺阿里·扎伊迪被提名为下一任伊拉克总理。特朗普表示，他祝愿他在组建一个没有恐怖主义、能为伊拉克带来更光明未来的新政府方面取得成功，并期待两国之间建立强大、富有成效的新关系。特朗普写道：“这是我们两国之间开启的一个巨大新篇章——前所未有的繁荣、稳定与成功。” @wfwitness

text: OSINTdefender U.S. President Donald J. Trump has wished Iraqi Prime Minister Delegate Ali Faleh Al-Zaidi success as he works to form a new government, following the lengthy impasse over the next Iraqi prime minister, as Iraq’s government continues to struggle balancing competing U.S.-Iranian interests in the country. Per the Iraqi prime minister’s office, President Trump spoke with Al-Zaidi today and discussed bilateral cooperation. Additionally, per the Iraqi prime minister’s office, President Trump extended an invitation to the prime minister designate to visit Washington. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 美国总统唐纳德·J·特朗普祝愿伊拉克候任总理阿里·法利赫·扎伊迪在组建新政府的工作中取得成功。此前，伊拉克下一任总理人选陷入长期僵局，而伊拉克政府在平衡国内相互竞争的美国与伊朗利益方面持续挣扎。据伊拉克总理办公室称，特朗普总统今天与扎伊迪进行了交谈，并讨论了双边合作。此外，据伊拉克总理办公室称，特朗普总统已邀请候任总理访问华盛顿。推文

text: Status-6 (War & Military News) Two major Russian oil infrastructure facilities located in the vicinity of the city of Perm were on fire on Friday following Ukrainian drone strikes on April 29/30. 1. "Perm" linear production and dispatch station - an important node of the Perm-Almetyevsk oil pipeline, owned by JSC Transneft-Prikamye. It is is responsible for pumping, saving and distributing oil through main pipelines of the the Transneft system. At least 4 fuel tanks located on its territory were on fire on Friday. 2. Lukoil-Permnefteorgsintez oil refinery - One of the largest oil refineries in Russia with a design capacity of 13.1 million tons per year for oil refining, 1.7 million tons per year for liquid hydrocarbon processing, and 1.46 billion cubic meters per year for associated petroleum gas processing. Its AVT-4 primary distillation unit was struck by Ukrainian drones. tweet
text_zh: Status-6（战争与军事新闻）周五，在4月29日/30日乌克兰无人机袭击后，位于彼尔姆市附近的两个主要俄罗斯石油基础设施发生火灾。 1. “彼尔姆”线性生产和调度站——这是俄罗斯国家石油管道运输公司（Transneft-Prikamye）拥有的彼尔姆-阿尔梅季耶夫斯克输油管道的重要节点。它负责通过Transneft系统的主要管道进行石油的泵送、储存和分配。周五，其领土上至少有4个燃料罐起火。 2. 卢克石油-彼尔姆炼油厂——俄罗斯最大的炼油厂之一，设计年炼油能力为1310万吨，液态烃加工能力为170万吨/年，伴生气加工能力为14.6亿立方米/年。其AVT-4初馏装置遭到乌克兰无人机袭击。推文
